name: security_monitor
description: Monitor and request security authorizations for high-risk operations.

methods.name: security_status_check
methods.description: Check which high-risk tools are currently authorized or locked.

methods.name: request_security_clearance
methods.description: Manually trigger a biometric Passkey request on the user's mobile device.

args.name: reason
args.description: The reason why higher clearance is needed.
